name: Cluster Grenade
description: The cluster grenade launches mini grenades which detonate in a large area of effect

name: Firestarter
description: Chambered shots contain a fine powder that increase the flammability of targets hit by the shotgun

name: Striker
description: The Striker shield is a modified version of the crusader shield, allowing the K8-JetStream Flamethrower to be used while equipped. In addition, the Striker shield boosts the damage of the user and all allies behind them based on the number of enemies in front of the shield

name: Shock Hardened Frame
description: Mod to increase the health of the shield skill

name: Macromolecular Coverings
description: Mod to increase the regeneration rate of the shield skill (while active)
